calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption-Enforcement Of Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-12-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. PHILIP T. KILDUFF, TEL. NO. 1-415-673-0368 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NADINE BLASCHAK-BROWN & KEVIN BROWN, TEL. NO. 1-415-238-7054, DEFENDANTS APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. Hearing On Claim Of Exemption of Defendant Nadine Balschak-Brown (Enforcement Of Judgment) is granted in part and denied in part. The levying officer is directed to release any funds held to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment in the amount of $2,000.00. The sheriff to release $2,127.45 to the judgment debtor. Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ehg

Claim Of Exemption (Wage Garnishment)
Off Calendar Nov-12-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. PHILIP T. KILDUFF, TEL. NO. 1-415-673-0368 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NADINE BLASCHAK-BROWN & KEVIN BROWN, TEL. NO. 1-415-238-7054, DEFENDANTS APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: Hearing on the Claim Of Exemption of Nadine Blaschak-Brown (Wage Garnishment) is Denied. Sheriff to withhold $50.00 per pay period. Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ehg

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. Hearing On Claim Of Exemption of NADINE BLASCHAK BROWN IS GRANTED. $721.58 FROM THE ACCOUNT ENDING IN 54 SHALL BE RETURNED TO JUDGMENT DEBTOR. 75% OF THE BALANCE IN ACCOUNT ENDING IN 83 SHALL BE RETURNED TO JUDGMENT DEBTOR (CCP 704.070(B)(2)).
